{{CargoRelic
|name=Mask of Zorro
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=09-17
|source=* Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wish (1.2%)
* [[Fugitives|Zorro]] (B+B Reward)
|description=On Sep 17, AD 1575, Torro put on this black mask and launched a big operation.

Miguel, the new governor of Spain, was assassinated. Before he died, he passed his position and official seal to his friend Diego, the top swordsman in Europe. Meanwhile, a masked man appeared from nowhere and started punishing the evil and helping the weak. Zorro's fame spread like wildfire, causing the rulers a headache. Eventually, he killed Colonel Huerta and ended his dictatorship. Zorro managed to escape the siege. Since then, the masked Zorro had become a nightmare for all tyrants.
|fame=48
|art=30
|fth=31
|civ=23
|tech=22
|ss1=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss2=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +4<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss3=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +5<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss4=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +7<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss7=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +7<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40<br>Snail DEF +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill I.png|50px]] Place in Exploration Compass: FAME Checks -5
}}

[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Compass Boost]]
[[Category:FAME Boost]]
[[Category:Angel Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Research Speedup Boost]]
